packageRules.description: Patch and digest bumps are automerged. They land before the 02:00 release run, so they ship the same night.
GitHub Actions. Grouped, and chore(deps) rather than fix(deps): a bumped action does not change the shipped artifact, so it should not cut a release on its own.
Minors of the framework and of the runtime image are real upgrades of the thing we ship. They get a human.
Majors are never automerged. They land on the dependency dashboard and wait for a human.
